import{changeColor}from"./colorpicker";//OnClick handlers that takes in a color string and sets the color depending on the className. Every handleClick is then passed as props to colorpicker-button.tsx
export var handleClickHair=function handleClickHair(color){changeColor("hair",color);};export var handleClickShirt=function handleClickShirt(color){changeColor("shirt",color);};export var handleClickLips=function handleClickLips(color){changeColor("lips",color);};export var handleClickEyelids=function handleClickEyelids(color){changeColor("eyelids",color);};export var handleClickGlasses=function handleClickGlasses(color){changeColor("eyeglasses",color);};export var handleClickGlassesTint=function handleClickGlassesTint(color){changeColor("eyeglasses-glasses",color);};export var handleClickOuter=function handleClickOuter(color){changeColor("hearingaid-outer",color);};export var handleClickInner=function handleClickInner(color){changeColor("hearingaid-inner",color);};export var handleClickEyes=function handleClickEyes(color){changeColor("iris",color);};export var handleClickJewellery=function handleClickJewellery(color){changeColor("jewellery",color);};export var handleClickBeard=function handleClickBeard(color){changeColor("beard",color);};export var handleClickUnderCut=function handleClickUnderCut(color){changeColor("undercut",color);};export var handleClickHat=function handleClickHat(color){changeColor("hat",color);};export var handleClickHairbands=function handleClickHairbands(color){changeColor("hairband",color);};
